pi_items.metadata_value: SELECT p.prod_category, c.country_iso_code, SUM(s.amount_sold) as total_sales, COUNT(*) as num_txns FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id GROUP BY p.prod_category, c.country_iso_code ORDER BY total_sales DESC
